upright.overall: New beginnings, innocence, taking a leap of faith.
upright.past: A past risk or fresh start set your path in motion.
upright.present: You are at the start of something new; trust the journey.
upright.future: An unexpected opportunity will require courage.

reversed.overall: Recklessness, fear of change, poor judgment.
reversed.past: A careless decision still affects you.
reversed.present: Hesitation or naivety may cause mistakes.
reversed.future: A missed opportunity if fear or foolishness dominates.

upright.overall: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action.
upright.past: You manifested your desires through skill and determination.
upright.present: You possess the power to turn visions into reality.
upright.future: Your skills and resources will align to achieve your goals.

reversed.overall: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents.
reversed.past: You may have used deception or wasted potential.
reversed.present: You're not using talents effectively or being dishonest.
reversed.future: Beware of manipulation or unrealized potential.

upright.overall: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, subconscious.
upright.past: You were guided by intuition and inner wisdom.
upright.present: Listen to your inner voice; answers lie within.
upright.future: Hidden knowledge will be revealed through introspection.

reversed.overall: Secrets, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal.
reversed.past: You ignored your intuition or kept harmful secrets.
reversed.present: You're blocking your inner voice or hiding truths.
reversed.future: Continued secrecy or intuition blockage will cause problems.

upright.overall: Femininity, beauty, nature, nurturing, abundance.
upright.past: A period of abundance and nurturing energy surrounded you.
upright.present: Embrace creativity and nurture projects and relationships.
upright.future: Prosperity and growth are coming; efforts will bear fruit.

reversed.overall: Creative block, dependence, emptiness, lack of growth.
reversed.past: You neglected self-care or experienced stagnation.
reversed.present: You're experiencing creative blocks or over-dependence.
reversed.future: Without self-care, growth will remain stunted.

upright.overall: Authority, establishment, structure, father figure.
upright.past: You established order and took control of circumstances.
upright.present: Take charge and create structure; lead with wisdom.
upright.future: You will step into a position of power and responsibility.

reversed.overall: Domination, excessive control, lack of discipline.
reversed.past: You were too controlling or lacked necessary discipline.
reversed.present: You're being tyrannical or lacking structure.
reversed.future: Rigidity or chaos will undermine your authority.

upright.overall: Spiritual wisdom, tradition, conformity, institutions.
upright.past: You sought guidance from traditional sources or mentors.
upright.present: Honor tradition and seek wisdom from established teachers.
upright.future: A mentor or spiritual guide will appear on your path.

reversed.overall: Personal beliefs, freedom, challenging status quo.
reversed.past: You rejected tradition or forged your own path.
reversed.present: You're breaking from convention or questioning dogma.
reversed.future: Independence from tradition will define your journey.

upright.overall: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices.
upright.past: An important relationship or choice shaped your path.
upright.present: A significant choice lies before you; follow your heart.
upright.future: A meaningful partnership or important decision approaches.

reversed.overall: Self-love, disharmony, imbalance, misaligned values.
reversed.past: A relationship ended or values conflicted.
reversed.present: You're experiencing relationship difficulties or value conflicts.
reversed.future: Misalignment will cause separation or difficult choices.

upright.overall: Control, willpower, success, action, determination.
upright.past: You overcame obstacles through determination and will.
upright.present: Take the reins and charge forward with confidence.
upright.future: Success is yours if you maintain focus and determination.

reversed.overall: Lack of control, aggression, opposition, directionless.
reversed.past: You lost control or headed in the wrong direction.
reversed.present: You're struggling with control or facing opposition.
reversed.future: Without direction, you'll lose momentum and fail.

upright.overall: Strength, courage, persuasion, compassion, inner power.
upright.past: You showed courage and compassion in difficulty.
upright.present: Face challenges with inner strength and gentle persuasion.
upright.future: Your inner strength will help overcome any obstacle.

reversed.overall: Self-doubt, low energy, raw emotion, weakness.
reversed.past: You lacked confidence or let emotions override reason.
reversed.present: You're doubting yourself or feeling powerless.
reversed.future: Continued self-doubt will prevent you from succeeding.

upright.overall: Soul-searching, introspection, solitude, inner guidance.
upright.past: A period of introspection led to important insights.
upright.present: Withdraw from noise and seek answers within yourself.
upright.future: Solitude will bring the wisdom and clarity you seek.

reversed.overall: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, losing your way.
reversed.past: You isolated yourself too much or avoided introspection.
reversed.present: You're withdrawing excessively or feeling lost.
reversed.future: Continued isolation will lead to deeper loneliness.

upright.overall: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, turning point.
upright.past: A stroke of luck or karmic event changed your trajectory.
upright.present: Fate is at work; embrace the changes coming your way.
upright.future: A turning point approaches; trust in life's cycles.

reversed.overall: Bad luck, resistance to change, breaking cycles.
reversed.past: You experienced a downturn or resisted necessary change.
reversed.present: You're fighting against inevitable changes.
reversed.future: Resisting the wheel's turn will bring misfortune.

upright.overall: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law.
upright.past: A fair outcome resulted from past actions.
upright.present: Seek truth and fairness; actions have consequences.
upright.future: Justice will be served; you'll get what you deserve.

reversed.overall: Unfairness, lack of accountability, dishonesty.
reversed.past: You avoided accountability or experienced injustice.
reversed.present: You're being dishonest or treated unfairly.
reversed.future: Injustice or dishonesty will catch up with you.

upright.overall: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives.
upright.past: You gained wisdom by letting go and seeing differently.
upright.present: Pause and release control; a new perspective is needed.
upright.future: Surrendering will bring unexpected insights and growth.

reversed.overall: Delays, resistance, stalling, indecision.
reversed.past: You were stuck in limbo or resisted necessary sacrifice.
reversed.present: You're resisting change or delaying important decisions.
reversed.future: Continued resistance will keep you stuck.

upright.overall: Endings, change, transformation, transition, rebirth.
upright.past: A significant ending or transformation occurred.
upright.present: Release what no longer serves you; transformation is needed.
upright.future: Major change is coming; embrace the transformation.

reversed.overall: Resistance to change, personal transformation, stagnation.
reversed.past: You resisted necessary endings or change.
reversed.present: You're clinging to the past or fearing transformation.
reversed.future: Avoiding change will lead to stagnation and decay.

upright.overall: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose, harmony.
upright.past: You found balance and harmony through patience.
upright.present: Seek moderation and balance in all things; be patient.
upright.future: Harmony will come through measured, balanced action.

reversed.overall: Imbalance, excess, self-healing, re-alignment needed.
reversed.past: You experienced extremes or lost balance.
reversed.present: You're living in extremes or lacking moderation.
reversed.future: Without balance, chaos and excess will dominate.

upright.overall: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction, bondage.
upright.past: You were trapped by unhealthy attachments or behaviors.
upright.present: Examine your dependencies; break free from bondage.
upright.future: Beware of temptation and unhealthy patterns.

reversed.overall: Releasing limiting beliefs, exploring darkness, detachment.
reversed.past: You began breaking free from restrictions.
reversed.present: You're confronting your shadow or releasing addictions.
reversed.future: Freedom from bondage is within reach if you persist.

upright.overall: Sudden change, upheaval, chaos, revelation, awakening.
upright.past: A sudden upheaval shattered your foundations.
upright.present: Brace for sudden change; what's false must fall.
upright.future: A revelation will shake foundations but clear room for truth.

reversed.overall: Personal transformation, fear of change, averting disaster.
reversed.past: You narrowly avoided disaster or experienced internal upheaval.
reversed.present: You're avoiding necessary change or transforming internally.
reversed.future: Delaying the tower's fall will only make it worse.

upright.overall: Hope, faith, purpose, renewal, spirituality, healing.
upright.past: You found hope and renewed faith after difficulty.
upright.present: Have faith; healing and renewal are available to you.
upright.future: Hope returns; your wishes will be granted.

reversed.overall: Lack of faith, despair, self-trust issues, disconnection.
reversed.past: You lost hope or became disconnected from spirituality.
reversed.present: You're losing faith or doubting yourself.
reversed.future: Without hope, despair will overwhelm you.

upright.overall: Illusion, fear, anxiety, subconscious, intuition, mystery.
upright.past: Confusion and illusion clouded your judgment.
upright.present: Trust intuition but verify facts; things aren't clear.
upright.future: Mysteries will unfold; listen to dreams and intuition.

reversed.overall: Release of fear, repressed emotion, inner confusion.
reversed.past: You began releasing fears or confronting illusions.
reversed.present: You're clearing confusion or facing repressed emotions.
reversed.future: Clarity will come as illusions fade and fears release.

upright.overall: Positivity, fun, warmth, success, vitality, joy.
upright.past: A time of joy and success blessed your life.
upright.present: Bask in success and happiness; everything is illuminated.
upright.future: Joy, success, and vitality are coming your way.

reversed.overall: Inner child, temporary sadness, overly optimistic.
reversed.past: You experienced temporary darkness or false optimism.
reversed.present: You're feeling down or being unrealistically positive.
reversed.future: Clouds may temporarily dim your light.

upright.overall: Judgement, rebirth, inner calling, absolution, awakening.
upright.past: You experienced a significant awakening or reckoning.
upright.present: Reflect on your past and rise to your calling.
upright.future: A moment of reckoning will bring clarity and renewal.

reversed.overall: Self-doubt, inner critic, ignoring the call, self-loathing.
reversed.past: You were too harsh on yourself or ignored your calling.
reversed.present: You're doubting yourself or avoiding your purpose.
reversed.future: Ignoring your calling will lead to regret.

upright.overall: Completion, accomplishment, travel, fulfillment, harmony.
upright.past: You achieved completion and fulfillment in an important area.
upright.present: Celebrate your accomplishments; a cycle completes successfully.
upright.future: Success and completion await; the world is yours.

reversed.overall: Seeking closure, shortcuts, delays, incomplete.
reversed.past: You took shortcuts or left things incomplete.
reversed.present: You're close to completion but experiencing delays.
reversed.future: Shortcuts will prevent true fulfillment and completion.
